title: papaver × intercedens
intro: Papaver × intercedens, also known as the California poppy or golden poppy, is a hybrid poppy plant that is a cross between the California poppy (Eschscholzia californica) and the Shasta daisy (Papaver californicum). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Papaver × intercedens include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and easing symptoms of insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
